Kamiyama Marugoto College of Technology

Where makers become founders.

A private 5-year KOSEN opened in 2023 in Kamiyama, Tokushima. We nurture people who create new value through technology, design, and entrepreneurship.

Explore the schoolContact
Philosophy

From makers to founders.

Kamiyama Marugoto College of Technology is a private 5-year KOSEN in Kamiyama, Tokushima. Over five years, students weave together engineering, design, and entrepreneurship, treating the small mountain town of about 5,000 people as their extended campus.

This is an unofficial introduction site. For accurate, up-to-date information, please visit the official site.

Highlights

Three lenses on the school.

01 — About

A new KOSEN, born in the mountains.

Opened in April 2023 in Kamiyama, Tokushima — a five-year program weaving technology, design, and entrepreneurship.

Learn more
02 — Education

From makers to founders.

A project-based curriculum that interweaves engineering, design, and entrepreneurship over five years.

Learn more
03 — Campus

The whole town is our campus.

A residential campus surrounded by forests and rivers, open to the community of Kamiyama.

Learn more
Visit / Contact

Visit and reach out.

For school visits, press inquiries, or admissions questions, please get in touch.

Access Contact
